outcome_statement: Adam opens LifeRE alpha, sees daily command center, top-3 priorities, and nightly debrief draft — without Cursor
pain: LifeRE OS v1 must reach Alpha — a founder-usable daily command center for real estate agents. Stopping on pipeline gates without reaching Point B is failure.
value: Adam opens LifeRE alpha, sees daily command center, top-3 priorities, and nightly debrief draft — without Cursor
success_metrics: Open /overlay/lifeos-app.html LifeRE path; complete one daily command center cycle; confirm top-3 and debrief visible
constraints: BuilderOS system path only — no agent hand-build
scope_boundary: LifeRE light operational copilot: daily command center, top-3 priorities, nightly debrief, compliance guardrails. Extend production spine — no parallel stack.
unacceptable_result: Partial blueprint labeled Alpha; bypass of staging/approval gates
ownership: ARC emits machine twin; Builder executes; Adam owns founder usability verdict

point_model.A: Vision — Adam provides FP in development stage
point_model.B: Chair locks handoff — corridor protected; Adam done until Alpha
